try-refresh: Try refreshing this page again in a moment.
export-history-description: Review generated CSV files, track progress, and download completed exports again whenever you need them.
import-history-description: Review completed and failed CSV imports, then open error files when a job needs attention.
import-description: CSV imports started from your modules will appear here with their status, processed rows, and any error files you may need to review.
import-type-description: {{label}} imports will appear here after someone uploads a CSV file. Error files will also be available here whenever a job needs attention.
export-description: CSV exports will appear here after someone downloads records from a module. Completed files can be downloaded again from this page.
export-type-description: {{label}} exports will appear here after someone downloads records in that section. Completed files can be downloaded again from this page.
